---
title: "CISP 360 \n Structured Programming"
subtitle: "Introduction to C++"
author: "Dr. Caleb Fowler"
version: "1.0.0"

format:
  revealjs:
    margin: 0.05
    css: ../styles/styles.css
    theme: serif
    slide-number: true
    navigation-mode: vertical
    transition: slide
    incremental: false
    scrollable: false
    controls: true
    hash: true
    history: true
    title-slide: false
    footer: "CISP 360 · Fowler"
    keyboard: true
    include-after-body:
      - text: |
          <script>
          window.Reveal.on('ready', event => {
            Reveal.configure({
              keyboard: {
                34: 'down',
                33: 'up',
                116: 'right',
                190: 'left',
                79: null
              }
            });
          });
          </script>

engine: jupyter
execute:
  eval: true
  echo: true

resources:
 - topics/**/images/**

---


## Last Time

::: {.incremental}

- The Conditional Operator
- The switch Statement
- Menu Driven Programs
- Menu Architectures
- Using Functions in a Menu Driven Program

:::


## Today's Agenda

- Vector Bounds and Safety
- Checking if a vector is empty
- Comparing vector elements
- STL Power Tools
- Parallel Vector Problem

::: notes

:::



{{< include topics/vector_bounds_n_safety/vector_bounds_n_safety.qmd >}}
{{< include topics/empty_vector/empty_vector.qmd >}}
{{< include topics/compare_elements/compare_elements.qmd >}}
{{< include topics/stl_tools/stl_tools.qmd >}}
{{< include topics/parallel_vec_problem/parallel_vec_problem.qmd >}}
{{< include topics/code_this/code_this.qmd >}}


# Key Takaways




# Next Time
